Feature belongs to project "Orders" in workspace "DabDash". Now let me create the task with the proper relations.

input.code:
cd /Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain/richmond
set -a; source .env; set +a
HTTP_URL=$(echo "$SURREAL_URL" | sed 's|ws://|http://|;s|wss://|https://|;s|/rpc$||')

curl -sk -X POST "${HTTP_URL}/sql" \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "surreal-ns: ${SURREAL_NAMESPACE}" \
  -H "surreal-db: ${SURREAL_DATABASE}" \
  -u "${SURREAL_USERNAME}:${SURREAL_PASSWORD}" \
  -d "
BEGIN TRANSACTION;

-- Create the task
LET \$task = CREATE task CONTENT {
  title: 'Implement PDF invoice and packing slip generation',
  description: 'Build the PDF generation pipeline for invoices and packing slips, including template rendering, data population from order records, and downloadable output.',
  status: 'open',
  priority: 'high',
  category: 'engineering',
  workspace: workspace:\`419bb6cd-d89f-45c2-a2d7-e1759e91ccb1\`,
  created_at: time::now()
};

-- Link task to feature via has_task relation
RELATE feature:\`d74516cc-6d63-46d9-9944-327e06d8bf75\`->has_task->\$task SET added_at = time::now();

-- Link task to feature via belongs_to relation
RELATE \$task->belongs_to->feature:\`d74516cc-6d63-46d9-9944-327e06d8bf75\` SET added_at = time::now();

COMMIT TRANSACTION;
"
input.intent: Create task and link to feature
